title: Nvidia Invests $2B in AI Cloud Company Nebius. CoreWeave Stock Isn’t the Only ‘NeoCloud’ Play.
description: The cloud-computing company is set to get an investment from chip maker  Nvidia  which continues to backstop the artificial-intelligence boom.  Nvidia will invest $2 billion in Nebius to enable the company to deploy more than five gigawatts of computing capacity by the end of 2030, the companies said on Wednesday.  The company had a market capitalization of just over $24 billion as of Tuesday’s close, and is one of a number of so-called “neoclouds,” smaller cloud-computing companies providing capacity for artificial intelligence.
